tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples only show i8 width tests; this tests i32 integer width with corresponding INT_MIN value (-2147483648) which is not explicitly covered in the known test examples

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @cmp_i32_and_negp2_with_eq_signmask(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %andx = and i32 %x, 4294967292
  %r = icmp eq i32 %andx, 2147483648
  ret i1 %r
}
=>
define i1 @cmp_i32_and_negp2_with_eq_signmask(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %r = icmp slt i32 %x, 2147483652
  ret i1 %r
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary and known tests only cover i8 and vector<i8>; this tests i64 width with 64-bit INT_MIN and negated power-of-2 (-64) not shown in examples

alive2.log:

define i1 @cmp_i64_and_negp2_with_ne_signmask(i64 %x) {
#0:

  %r = icmp ne i64 %andx, -9223372036854775808
  ret i1 %r
}
=>
define i1 @cmp_i64_and_negp2_with_ne_signmask(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %r = icmp sgt i64 %x, -9223372036854775745
  ret i1 %r
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
